description: Hand-annotated novel corpus for InkFlow eval framework. All texts are public domain from Project Gutenberg.

novels.title: Pride and Prejudice
novels.author: Jane Austen
novels.fixtureScope: First 3 chapters only (for cost-controlled eval runs)

groundTruthSchema.title: Novel title
groundTruthSchema.templateId: Expected writing template ID (one of: snowflake, save_the_cat, story_circle, hero_journey, kishotenketsu)

chapters.title: Chapter title as it appears in the text
